overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a cowboy character riding a horse through foggy grasslands during golden hour. The character navigates rolling hills, passes a wooden wagon, and rides through atmospheric haze with dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland prairie with rolling hills

agents.ego_description: riding a horse uphill through tall grass toward the hazy sun

entered.detail: green rolling hills extending into the foggy distance
dense tall grass covering the ground
bright sun diffused through atmospheric haze
flock of birds flying in the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider on horseback through dense tall grass. The landscape consists of rolling green hills extending into a hazy distance with the sun creating a bright backlight. Birds fly overhead in the foggy sky as the character rides steadily forward.

events.description: character turns left on horseback, changing direction across the field
wooden wagon and rock outcroppings come into view

agents.ego_description: turning left on horseback and riding laterally across the prairie

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop on the hillside
large fallen tree trunk on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and rides across the open prairie, revealing rock outcroppings on the left. As the ride continues, an abandoned wooden wagon and fallen log appear on the right side of the frame. The sun moves out of direct view as the camera angle changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie with abandoned wagon and distant smoke

events.description: character rides past the wooden wagon on the right
dark smoke column becomes visible in the distant sky

agents.ego_description: turning right on horseback and riding past the wagon toward distant smoke

entered.detail: dark smoke rising into the sky from a distant fire
large boulders and rock cluster on the right

segments.scene_description: The rider passes the abandoned wooden wagon and continues turning right through the tall grass. A dark smoke column becomes visible in the distant sky, suggesting a fire or camp. Large rock formations appear on the right as the character navigates around them.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy ridge with distant tree line

events.description: character completes turn and rides along the grassy ridge
sun emerges from behind haze creating strong backlighting on the grass

agents.ego_description: riding along a grassy ridge with the sun at the back, heading toward distant trees

entered.detail: line of trees on the horizon
scattered bushes in the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character rides along a grassy ridge with the sun now positioned behind, creating a strong backlight effect on the tall grass. A distant tree line appears on the horizon while the smoke column and rock formations fade from view. The atmosphere remains hazy as the ride continues toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy prairie that shifts from a bright, backlit expanse to a ridge overlooking a distant horizon. It begins by following a rider through dense tall grass and rolling green hills under a foggy sky filled with birds. As the rider turns left across the open prairie, the view expands to reveal rock outcroppings and an abandoned wooden wagon beside a fallen log. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, passing the wagon and navigating around large rock formations while a dark column of smoke appears in the distant sky. Finally, the camera follows the rider along a grassy ridge with the sun positioned behind, creating a strong backlight on the grass as the smoke fades and a distant tree line emerges on the horizon.
